semantic_description: Copies a caller-provided source string payload of length n into a destination buffer in reverse order, then writes a terminating zero at dst[n]. The source buffer contains l followed by zero and must be preserved; the destination buffer initially has length n+1 and is fully overwritten to rev(l) followed by zero. The key control structure is a for loop over i from 0 to n-1 that writes dst[i] from src[n-1-i], with an empty loop possible when n is zero.
